'''nabawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycalamide|mycalamide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycalamide|mycalamide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nabawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næbæwæth|næbæwæth]] || [[word:næbæwæj|næbæwæj]] || [[word:næbæwæsh|næbæwæsh]] || [[word:næbæwæ|næbæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nababawath|nababawath]] || [[word:nababawaj|nababawaj]] || [[word:nababawash|nababawash]] || [[word:nababawa|nababawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabawath|nabawath]] || [[word:nabawaj|nabawaj]] || [[word:nabawash|nabawash]] || [[word:nabawa|nabawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabafwath|nabafwath]] || [[word:nabafwaj|nabafwaj]] || [[word:nabafwash|nabafwash]] || [[word:nabafwaf|nabafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nabawatha|nabawatha]] || [[word:nabawaja|nabawaja]] || [[word:nabawasha|nabawasha]] || [[word:nabawaka|nabawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nabawath|nabawath]] || [[word:nabawaj|nabawaj]] || [[word:nabawash|nabawash]] || [[word:nabawa|nabawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nabawathal|nabawathal]] || [[word:nabawajal|nabawajal]] || [[word:nabawashal|nabawashal]] || [[word:nabawakal|nabawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nabawathatha|nabawathatha]] || [[word:nabawajaja|nabawajaja]] || [[word:nabawashasha|nabawashasha]] || [[word:nabawaka|nabawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nabawathan|nabawathan]] || [[word:nabawajan|nabawajan]] || [[word:nabawashan|nabawashan]] || [[word:nabawakan|nabawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nabawathaoro|nabawathaoro]] || [[word:nabawajaoro|nabawajaoro]] || [[word:nabawashaoro|nabawashaoro]] || [[word:nabawakaoro|nabawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
